name: Marzetti
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Mushroom stems and pieces, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish, combine 5 cups water, 1 tablespoon salt, and 3 cups uncooked noodles. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 12 minutes or until noodles are tender, stirring occasionally.
2. Drain noodles and set aside.
3. In a large, heat-resistant, non-metallic mixing bowl, melt 1/4 cup butter or margarine in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds.
4. Add bread crumbs and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 1 1/2 minutes or until bread crumbs are golden brown.
5. Add meat to bread crumb mixture and mix to combine well. Heat, uncovered, for 5 minutes or until meat is browned, stirring occasionally so meat crumbles.
6. Add onions, green pepper, garlic salt, salt, and pepper. Blend into meat mixture thoroughly. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes.
7. In a 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish, layer cooked noodles with meat mixture. Top with cheese, tomato sauce, and mushrooms (in that order). Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 8 minutes or until cheese melts.
